case_title: SUNTRUST BANKS VS. APTCO INC et al

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT 1-10
DECLARATION RE INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST BANKS

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST BANKS AS TO DEFENDANT APTCO INC 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-05-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-04-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-08-2002

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APTCO INC $41,925.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,229.03 INTEREST, $274.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $43,428.28, TOTAL $ 43,428.28 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
